name: Fried Oysters Cesenatico
recipeIngredient: bottom shells reserved -- washed and dried
1/2 Cup flour seasoned with black pepper and nutmeg
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oil to 365 degrees F.
2. Pick through the oysters to ensure there are no shell pieces attached and place them in milk.
3. Remove one oyster, shake it dry, and dredge it in seasoned flour.
4. Remove the oyster, dredge it in egg whites, then shake off excess liquid and dredge in bread crumbs.
5. Continue this process until all oysters are breaded.
6. Place six oysters at a time in hot oil and fry until dark golden brown, about 1 to 2 minutes.
7. Remove the fried oysters and replace them in warmed shells.
8. Serve immediately with spumante.
Yield: 4 servings
